nl_intent: Reduce the video resolution by half to speed up generation
wrongness_description: Model halved only the width of EmptyHunyuanLatentVideo node 40 from 832 to 416 while leaving height at 480. This breaks the 832x480 16:9 aspect ratio, producing a 416x480 portrait crop that distorts motion and composition. A correct resolution reduction must halve both width and height (to 416x240) or choose a valid aspect-correct resolution pair.
